attributes.text: 🚨 𝐔𝐫𝐠𝐞𝐧𝐭 𝐇𝐢𝐫𝐢𝐧𝐠: #Content_Writer ✍️ C+A Global India is looking for a 𝐂𝐨𝐧𝐭𝐞𝐧𝐭 𝐖𝐫𝐢𝐭𝐞𝐫 to join our team. 📍 𝐋𝐨𝐜𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧: Mohali, Punjab ⏰ 𝐒𝐡𝐢𝐟𝐭: 12 PM – 9 PM 💼 𝐄𝐱𝐩𝐞𝐫𝐢𝐞𝐧𝐜𝐞: 1+ Year 𝐑𝐞𝐪𝐮𝐢𝐫𝐞𝐦𝐞𝐧𝐭𝐬: • Create and manage product-related documentation and listings (training will be provided). • Conduct research and organize content effectively. • Work closely with the team to develop new content ideas and strategies. • Collaborate with designers and developers to ensure content aligns with the brand voice. • Write, edit, and proofread engaging content. 📩 Send your CV: akanksha.choudhary@caglobal.com #Hiring #ContentWriter #MohaliJobs #ImmediateHiring #PunjabJobs #ContentWriting #JoinOurTeam

error.debugMessage:
Assertion '"Sign Up" is visible' failed. Check the UI hierarchy in debug artifacts to verify the element state and properties.

Possible causes:
- Element selector may be incorrect - check if there are similar elements with slightly different names/properties.
- Element may be temporarily unavailable due to loading state
- This could be a real regression that needs to be addressed
